code:
def generate_signals(df, params):
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    import ta
    rolling_window = params['rolling_window']
    rsi_threshold = params['rsi_threshold']
    resistance_buffer = params['resistance_buffer']
    support_buffer = params['support_buffer']
    df['rolling_high'] = df['high'].rolling(window=rolling_window).max()
    df['rolling_low'] = df['low'].rolling(window=rolling_window).min()
    df['rsi'] = ta.momentum.rsi(df['close'], window=rolling_window)
    df['signal'] = 0
    df.loc[(df['close'] > df['rolling_high'] - resistance_buffer) & (df['rsi'] < rsi_threshold), 'signal'] = -1
    df.loc[(df['close'] < df['rolling_low'] + support_buffer) & (df['rsi'] > 100 - rsi_threshold), 'signal'] = 1
    return df['signal'].astype(int)
rationale: EUR/USD exhibits mean reversion behavior near support and resistance levels, confirmed by RSI overbought/oversold conditions.
